benefits.description: Unlimited supply of energy, felt like being 20 years old again. Energy levels decreased slightly after cycle but remained elevated.
Sleep patterns changed permanently, circadian rhythms synced to sun cycles, able to fall back asleep easily after disruption at night.
New emotions of joy, life felt more enjoyable, feelings of physical pleasure increased 3x compared to before.

side_effects.description: Problems with eye muscles, did not focus correctly. Resolved with small exercise.

protocol_notes: 10mg sublingual (held 2-3 minutes) or injection. 10 days every 3 months. Source: Russian Peptide (russianpeptide.com). OP notes being in ketosis during the experiment and also uses poliprenols. Lives in Netherlands.
